docs.title: Home
docs.text: Home Top-level page used to verify base-path computation when the root page is at depth 0. Links across sections: Section A overview Section B overview

docs.title: Section A — Detail
docs.text: Section A — Detail Sibling of overview at the same depth.

docs.title: Section A — Overview
docs.text: Section A — Overview Page at depth 1. The rendered HTML should reference assets via .. and link to Detail and back to Home .

docs.title: Section B — Overview
docs.text: Section B — Overview Page in a second top-level section, used to verify the nav renders both sections distinctly.
